name: toolkit
description: Self-contained HTML deliverable toolkit — bundles html-artifact (one-off visual deliverables), publish-html (turn a local .html into a shareable URL), for-dummies (auto-derived project intros), move-call-chains (HTML call-chain diagrams for Sui Move packages), and inkscape-live (live-edit the open macOS Inkscape document via the inkscape MCP server).
